articles.description: This quote highlights a simple but powerful idea: focusing only on making money is not enough to succeed. Rockefeller, one of the richest businessmen in history, believed that people need a bigger goal in life or business.

articles.title: Parl panel suggests X ‘Community Notes’ may be treated as publishing activity: Chairperson
articles.description: Panel urges MeitY to act on X Community Notes, suggests publisher tax model; experts warn of free speech impact in India

articles.title: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
articles.description: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.

articles.title: Djibouti’s President Guelleh wins sixth straight term in office
articles.description: The longtime ruler, in power since 1999, has secured 97 percent of the vote, according to official results.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by former Intel CEO Andy Grove: Why ‘only the paranoid survive’ competition
articles.description: Andy Grove's philosophy emphasizes that complacency leads to failure in the tech industry. His experience at Intel taught him the importance of adaptability and vigilance against competition, leading to a successful shift from memory chips to microprocessors.

articles.title: US-Iran war: Why is Tehran unable to open Strait of Hormuz to more shipping traffic? American officials reveal
articles.description: US officials said that Iran struggles to reopen the Strait of Hormuz due to uncertainty over naval mine locations and its inability to clear them. A two-week cease-fire would depend on the ‘complete, immediate, and safe opening’ of the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said on Tuesday.

articles.title: Assembly Elections LIVE: BJP government in West Bengal will speed up CAA implementation, says PM Modi at rally in Katwa
articles.description: "I want to tell the Matua and Namasudra refugee families that they are under the protection of the country's Constitution," says PM Modi at a rally

topStories.title: US-Iran war: Why is Tehran unable to open Strait of Hormuz to more shipping traffic? American officials reveal
topStories.description: US officials said that Iran struggles to reopen the Strait of Hormuz due to uncertainty over naval mine locations and its inability to clear them. A two-week cease-fire would depend on the ‘complete, immediate, and safe opening’ of the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said on Tuesday.

topStories.title: US, Iran To Hold Key Peace Meet Shortly. What's On The Agenda?
topStories.description: While Iran has a 10-point proposal, which Donald Trump had said would be "workable", the US had its own 15-point framework.

topStories.title: Supreme Court says voting, contesting polls not fundamental rights: ‘It’s well settled'
topStories.description: A bench of Justices BV Nagarathna and R Mahadevan said that these rights exist only to the extent provided by law.

topStories.title: On Camera, Youth Congress Leader Killed 2 Weeks Before Wedding In Karnataka
topStories.description: Fairoz Pathan's body was found on the bedroom floor. He appears to have suffered a head injury, as he lay in a pool of blood.

topStories.title: Iran Brings Minab 168 Child Victims Images To Islamabad Ceasefire Talks
topStories.description: Iran arrived in Islamabad for US ceasefire talks carrying images of Minab 168 child victims, turning the negotiations into a demand for accountability.

topStories.title: IAF chief A P Singh discusses defence ties with his US counterpart
topStories.description: IAF chief Air Chief Marshal A P Singh also travelled to Nellis Air Force Base in Nevada, where the visit included briefings at the US Air Force Warfare Centre and a familiarisation flight in an F-15EX Eagle II.

topStories.title: 'No Backup Plan': Trump Makes Bold Claim On US-Iran Talks, Issues Fresh Threat
topStories.description: Earlier, Trump claimed that the US would move forward "with or without" a deal with Iran to re-open up the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Israel rejects ceasefire with Hezbollah ahead of Lebanon talks next week
topStories.description: Talks due in Washington as Israeli attacks on Lebanon continue, Iran says ceasefire must include them.

topStories.description: The UK plans to abandon its proposal to return the Chagos Islands to Mauritius due to opposition from Trump.

topStories.title: Video: Vance arrives in Pakistan for talks with Iran
topStories.description: US Vice President JD Vance has landed in Pakistan for talks with Iranian officials on a deal to end the war on Iran.

topStories.description: US envoy to India Sergio Gor hosted Misri at Mar-a-Lago. Gor expressed the US’ intent to deepen ties with India in the coming years.

topStories.description: U.S. intelligence reports suggest China is set to deliver new air defense systems to Iran, potentially using third countries to obscure their origin.

dailyNews.title: Russia and Ukraine set to begin Easter truce
dailyNews.description: The temporary ceasefire came as US-led talks on ending the four-year-old conflict have been derailed by the Middle East war. The two sides also held a ceasefire for the Orthodox Easter last year.

dailyNews.title: Concerns after satellite provider restricts Iran images following US pressure
dailyNews.description: Planet Labs says it is restricting coverage of Iran and parts of the Middle East indefinitely.

dailyNews.title: Trump backs Hilton ahead of California GOP vote, testing Bianco’s grip on party endorsement
dailyNews.description: California Republicans vote this Sunday to endorse a candidate for governor after Trump backed Steve Hilton over rival Sheriff Chad Bianco last week.

dailyNews.title: Watchdog, GOP lawmaker warn NY voter registration systems lacks key safeguards
dailyNews.description: Election integrity group RITE and Rep. Claudia Tenney threatened federal court action over alleged New York voter registration violations.

dailyNews.description: JD Vance, Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner lead a senior U.S. delegation in Pakistan for critical ceasefire negotiations with Iranian officials.

dailyNews.title: Kai Trump shares photos from Augusta National after Tiger Woods' DUI arrest, treatment departure
dailyNews.description: Kai Trump attended the Masters at Augusta National after the public fallout from Tiger Woods' DUI arrest and treatment seeking abroad.

dailyNews.description: Epstein survivors push back on first lady's call for public testimony, saying the burden should not be shifted onto survivors as Rep James Comer says hearings will happen.

dailyNews.title: Los Angeles schools may close as nearly 85% of district’s workers plan to strike
dailyNews.description: Los Angeles schools could close as they face a potential strike Tuesday, with three unions representing 70,000 employees demanding higher pay.

dailyNews.description: With Communist China targeting a crewed lunar landing by 2030, Artemis II shows why the Moon race is a contest for strategic power and national leadership.

dailyNews.description: Montana Sen. Tim Sheehy made an emergency landing in a field Friday after his plane experienced a mechanical engine failure during routine training.

dailyNews.description: Eric Swalwell is facing calls to drop out of his gubernatorial race, and his longtime supporters are backing away amid allegations from accusers claiming he sexually harassed them.

dailyNews.title: Iran Has Been Consistent in War. Will It Be Consistent in Peace Talks?
dailyNews.description: While President Trump’s war aims have changed by the moment, Iran has stuck to firm demands. The question is whether it will compromise in peace negotiations.

dailyNews.title: Iran Unable to Find Mines It Planted in Strait of Hormuz, U.S. Says
dailyNews.description: The lost mines have prevented Iran from quickly complying with President Trump’s demand to allow more ships to pass through the waterway.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Racing to Redefine ‘America First’ in a Time of War
dailyNews.description: Washington has been debating the thrust of Mr. Trump’s foreign policy for more than a decade, with the only consensus being that “America First” means whatever the president says it does.

dailyNews.title: Officials Release Design for 250-Foot Arch in Washington, as Trump Seeks Another Imprint
dailyNews.description: The president has proposed the arch, which would rise on a Washington roundabout across from the Lincoln Memorial, as a way to celebrate America’s 250th anniversary.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says First Lady ‘Had a Right’ to Talk About Epstein
dailyNews.description: President Trump said in an interview that he had known his wife wanted to address rumors about the late sex offender at some point, but that he had not known exactly what she would say.

dailyNews.title: Potential Democratic 2028 Candidates Condemn Trump’s ‘War of Choice’ in Iran
dailyNews.description: At a convention in New York, several Democrats mulling presidential bids rallied around opposition to President Trump’s decision to attack Iran.

dailyNews.title: Burned Before, Democrats Abruptly Revive the Idea of Impeaching Trump
dailyNews.description: Democrats in Congress have assiduously avoided talk of a third impeachment of President Trump, concerned that it would distract from their midterm campaign message. That tide seems to have turned.

dailyNews.title: Trump Moves Top Aide James Blair to Political Operation Ahead of Midterms
dailyNews.description: Mr. Blair will “lead the charge from the outside,” the president said on social media. The move comes as Republicans are bracing for a potentially difficult November election.

dailyNews.title: A Republican Strategist Explains What’s Going On With the Party
dailyNews.description: Without Trump on the midterms ballot, how will his party fare?

dailyNews.title: Fareed Zakaria on the Moral Cost of Trump’s War
dailyNews.description: The foreign policy analyst Fareed Zakaria explains how the Iran war has been a turning point in America’s standing in the world.

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
dailyNews.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.
